productDisplayName: Peter England Men Casual Off White Belt
description: A style essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england perfects this traditional accessory's foray into  modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with corduroy trousers or denims, casual shoes and t-shirts.
